page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.14xlarge is a general-purpose instance type powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 56 dedicated physical cores using the Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor, running at a clock speed of 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance is configured with 224.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, and it offers a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core metrics, such as stress-ng single-core CPU performance and Geekbench single-core scores, fall into the weak category, representing the bottom 25% of tested hardware. Single-threaded gzip compression is poor, landing in the bottom 10%. However, the 56 dedicated cores deliver average multi-core performance across stress-ng, Geekbench, and Passmark CPU tests. Memory bandwidth for both cached and uncached operations remains in the average tier.

Given the hardware profile, this instance offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads that scale horizontally across many cores rather than relying on high single-thread performance. It is suitable for multi-threaded tasks such as software compilation, database operations, static web serving, and medium-sized LLM inference prompt processing. It is less suited for single-threaded processing or workloads requiring local NVMe storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.14xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 56 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It is equipped with 224.0 GB of RAM, providing a 4.0 GB per core ratio, and has a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. The instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware. Benchmark data reveals a performance trade-off: single-core performance is weak, falling in the bottom 25%, while multi-core performance is average across stress-ng, Geekbench, and Passmark tests. Memory bandwidth and static web serving throughput also perform in the average tier. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-effective for highly parallelized workloads that benefit from a high core count but do not require maximum single-thread speed, such as multi-threaded software compilation, database operations, and static web serving.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.14xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 56 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 224 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, offering average multi-core and weak single-core performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.14xlarge features 56 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 224 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network speed for multi-threaded workloads.
tagline: A dedicated 56-core x86_64 platform with balanced memory, delivering steady multi-threaded performance for parallelized enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 56 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 physical cores at 2.5 GHz
224.0 GB of system memory providing a 1:4 core-to-RAM ratio
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with zero local storage
Average multi-core performance contrasting with weak single-core metrics
Suited for multi-threaded databases, software compilation, and web serving
